description: Santuario Solar System - Adapted from Grafana 13295 with Flux queries for InfluxDB 2.7.10

targets.query: from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "venus_mppt_total" and r._field == "power_w") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "et112_status" and r._field == "power_w") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bms_status" and r._field == "power") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "et112_status" and r._field == "energy_export_wh") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 1000.0}))
from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tasmota_status" and r._field == "energy_today_kwh") |> last()
from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "venus_mppt_total" and r._field == "power_w") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: max, createEmpty: false) |> sum()

from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "et112_status" and r._field == "energy_import_wh") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 1000.0}))
from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tasmota_status" and r._field == "energy_today_kwh") |> last()

from(bucket:"daly_bms") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "et112_status" and r._field == "energy_export_wh") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max, createEmpty: false) |> sum() |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value / 1000.0}))

options.html:
Santuario Solar System Dashboard

Adapted from Grafana 13295 - Home Energy Dashboard

Panel Descriptions

  • Power - Real-time power flows: Solar generation, grid export/import, and consumption
  • Today/This Month - Daily and monthly energy summaries with key metrics
  • Yield - Solar production tracking (daily and monthly aggregates)
  • Consumption - Grid and self-consumption energy tracking
  • Energy Balance - Net energy balance between import and export

Data Sources

  • BMS - Battery Management System (voltage, current, power, SOC)
  • Venus MPPT - Solar charge controller (power and energy generation)
  • ET112 Meters - Grid power measurement (import/export)
  • Tasmota - Outlets and consumption monitoring

Metrics

  • Solar Power: Venus MPPT total power output
  • Grid Power: ET112 imported/exported power
  • Consumption: BMS + Tasmota consumption
  • Refresh Rate: 30 seconds
  • Default Range: Last 24 hours (customizable)
